testcase.classname: domains.service getAllDomains() should return public domains on success
testcase.name: domains.service getAllDomains() should return public domains on success

testcase.classname: domains.service getAllDomains() should fallback to private endpoint if public fails
testcase.name: domains.service getAllDomains() should fallback to private endpoint if public fails

testcase.classname: domains.service getAllDomains() should return empty array if both fail
testcase.name: domains.service getAllDomains() should return empty array if both fail

testcase.classname: domains.service createDomain() should POST with auth
testcase.name: domains.service createDomain() should POST with auth

testcase.classname: domains.service should handle no token case
testcase.name: domains.service should handle no token case
